scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/database && bunx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd packages/database && bunx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: cd packages/database && bunx prisma db push
scripts.db:reset: cd packages/database && bunx prisma migrate reset
scripts.setup: bun install && bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed:admin
